string_table:
----Brotherhood----
Taking the dogs out
There is a pack of dogs in the valley north of the train hangar, on the other side of the hill. Butcher wants them dead.
I should report to Butcher and tell him that his problem is solved.
No future for a boar
There is a herd of boars in the wood, behind the Witches Jelly anomaly in the south eastern part of the sector. Butcher wants them dead.
I should report to Butcher and tell him that his problem is solved.
Lost snorks
There is a group of snorks to the south west of the train hangar close to the southern path to Agroprom. Butcher wants them dead.
I should report to Butcher and tell him that his problem is solved.
The great culling
Butcher wants me to check if the snork population oin Agroprom on the border to Garbage has grown too large. He told me to check the hill between the two passages to Garbage, and kill everz snork I see.
I should report to Butcher and tell him that the snorks shouldn't be a problem anymore.
--- Vybegallo ---
Meet Vybegallo
Butcher told me to find a scientist called Vybegallo in Agroprom
Vybegallo: for science!
I found a pseudogiant eye - I should bring it to Vybegallo
I found a pseudogiant hand - I should bring it to Vybegallo
I found a pseudogiant hide - I should bring it to Vybegallo
Vybegallo wants me to find him a pseudogiant body part: an eye, an hand or it's hide
